# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check at least one. The chosen type drives release-please versioning. -->

- [ ] `feat:` New skill content, new reference doc, new SOP, new agent target
- [ ] `fix:` Correct an inaccuracy, broken link, outdated guidance
- [ ] `docs:` README / CHANGELOG / repo metadata only (no skill changes)
- [ ] `refactor:` Restructure skill files without changing meaning
- [ ] `chore:` Tooling, CI, dependencies — no user-facing change

## Editing scope

- [ ] I edited only files under `skills/unreal-angelscript/` (the canonical source)
- [ ] My commit subject follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Skill content is project-agnostic (no proprietary code, asset paths, or internal tooling)
- [ ] Sources are cited for non-obvious technical claims

## Verification

<!-- How did you verify the change? E.g. "manually reviewed against Hazelight docs",
"tested install.sh on macOS", "ran release.yml locally with act", etc. -->

## Related

<!-- Link issues, RFCs, prior PRs, etc. -->
